meta.title: Admin Profile
meta.description: Review account details and update baseline preferences.

page.title: Profile
page.subtitle: Review account data and update language, timezone, and notification preferences.

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.hint: A clear face photo works best.

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose which channels are enabled for each notification type.

account.title: Edit account details
account.description: You can update your name only. Email cannot be changed.

notifications.title: Edit notification preferences
notifications.description: Choose which channels are enabled for each notification type.

meta.title: Revenue share rules
meta.description: Update platform vs practitioner revenue splits for future payments only.

revenueShare.title: Revenue share rules
revenueShare.description: Configure platform vs practitioner revenue splits based on country relation (local vs cross-border).
revenueShare.note: These rules affect future allocations only. Historical payments keep their stored snapshots.

local.title: Same country
local.hint: When the patient country matches the practitioner country.

crossBorder.title: Different country
crossBorder.hint: When the patient country differs from the practitioner country.
